scope: AgenC daemon server-to-client notification methods and session-scoped subscription replay mapped from the donor app-server notification/listener flow. AgenC keeps dot-separated event.* methods and a compact session multiplexer while preserving the donor control-plane contract: typed server push is routed only to subscribed clients and disconnected clients receive bounded replay.
_sourceRootBrandingAllow: branding-scan: allow donor source root path

requiredBehaviors: the daemon notification registry includes event.message_chunk, event.tool_request, event.permission_request, event.agent_status, and event.session_event
each event notification has typed params anchored by sessionId and eventId
the published JSON Schema accepts all event notification envelopes and rejects malformed params
edgeCases: event.permission_request requires a permission list instead of accepting a scalar
existing commandExec.outputDelta notification remains in the registry

requiredBehaviors: background agent progress is emitted as typed event.* JSON-RPC notifications instead of opaque daemon.event wrappers
agent message deltas map to event.message_chunk notifications
tool starts and permission prompts map to event.tool_request and event.permission_request notifications
turn status changes map to event.agent_status notifications while unrecognized events remain available through event.session_event
edgeCases: permission request input remains attached for the TUI approval bridge
messageId, streamId, and acceptedAt metadata survive where the typed method supports them

requiredBehaviors: typed session notifications are delivered through the same session route as existing daemon session events
multiple clients attached to one session receive independent ordered delivery
delivery failure for one client does not prevent delivery to other clients
typed notifications are rejected if params.sessionId does not match the session route
edgeCases: unknown clients cannot attach to session routes
duplicate client ids are rejected before mutating session state
mismatched typed notifications fail before they are buffered or delivered

requiredBehaviors: session notifications emitted with no attached clients are buffered for replay
reattaching to a session replays buffered notifications in original order
the per-session buffer is bounded and drops the oldest entries first
edgeCases: detaching or disconnecting a client keeps the daemon session alive
bounded replay applies to typed event.session_event notifications

requiredBehaviors: typed event.* notifications are converted into the existing TUI transcript event shapes
typed permission requests still flow through the TUI approval resolver
event.session_event preserves raw fallback events for compatibility
edgeCases: event.agent_status running produces a turn start transcript event
event.agent_status idle preserves the final message as lastAgentMessage
